response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software craftsmanship, architecture mindset, and communication skills, he lacks the specific domain expertise required for this senior IDE/JVM role. His career has focused on full-stack web development (TypeScript/Node.js) and data platforms rather than enterprise framework tooling or IDE internals. No evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, build tools (Maven/Gradle), or language tooling experience. His Java work is limited and dated; recent 8 years have been TypeScript-centric. He would require substantial ramp-up time in core focus areas, making him underqualified for a mid-senior position expecting immediate contribution.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship mindset with proven commitment to TDD, clean architecture, and extensible design
Demonstrated ability to work on complex systems and large-scale infrastructure (millions of requests/second)
Excellent communication and teaching ability through workshops, talks, and active open-source contributions
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in Spring ecosystem, enterprise frameworks (Quarkus, Hibernate), or JVM-focused development
Recent 8-year focus (re:cinq, Optilyz) on TypeScript/Node.js and web platforms rather than IDE or language tooling
No IDE development or language tooling experience; closest IDE work was C/C++ at National Instruments 18+ years ago

key_factors.factor: IDE internals and language tooling experience
